title: tanacetum crassicollum
intro: Tanacetum crassicollum, also known as a type of Tanacetum plant, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The medicinal properties of Tanacetum crassicollum include its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Tanacetum crassicollum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and soothe digestive issues. Tanacetum crassicollum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
